categories.name: Cybersecurity
categories.description: Master the foundational principles of cybersecurity and develop the practical skills required to secure networks, devices, and data.

exams.name: CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst (CySA+)
exams.hero_headline: Advance Your Security Career with CompTIA CySA+.
exams.hero_subheadline: Master incident detection, threat intelligence, and vulnerability management to confidently pass the CS0-003 exam.
exams.companion_problem: Preparing for the CySA+ exam requires mastering complex incident response processes, threat hunting, and continuous security monitoring, which can be overwhelming to synthesize.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever breaks down the official CompTIA CySA+ syllabus into 15-minute, highly focused study sessions. Our content maps directly to the CS0-003 exam objectives to ensure maximum retention and test readiness.

exams.name: CompTIA Security+
exams.hero_headline: Launch Your Cybersecurity Career with CompTIA Security+.
exams.hero_subheadline: Master core security concepts, threat mitigation, and network architecture to pass the SY0-701 exam with confidence.
exams.companion_problem: Cybersecurity threats evolve rapidly, and certification exams cover a massive breadth of topics that are difficult to synthesize into a structured study plan.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever breaks down the official CompTIA Security+ syllabus into 15-minute, highly focused study sessions. Our content maps directly to the SY0-701 exam objectives to ensure maximum retention and test readiness.

categories.name: IT Certification
categories.description: Exam-aligned prep for IT certifications with clear, syllabus-mapped coverage across hardware, networking, devices, troubleshooting, and modern workplace technologies.

exams.name: CompTIA A+ Core 1
exams.hero_headline: Build Your IT Support Foundation with CompTIA A+ Core 1.
exams.hero_subheadline: Master mobile devices, networking, hardware, cloud basics, and troubleshooting skills mapped directly to the 220-1201 exam objectives.
exams.companion_problem: CompTIA A+ Core 1 spans a wide range of practical IT support topics, and it is easy to lose track of how hardware, networking, mobile devices, and troubleshooting objectives fit together.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever turns the official CompTIA A+ Core 1 objectives into focused 15-minute study sessions so you can build durable understanding across the 220-1201 syllabus without drifting off-spec.

exams.name: CompTIA A+ Core 2
exams.hero_headline: Master Operating Systems, Security, and Support Workflows with CompTIA A+ Core 2.
exams.hero_subheadline: Study the 220-1202 objectives through focused lessons on operating systems, security, software troubleshooting, operational procedures, and real-world IT support practice.
exams.companion_problem: CompTIA A+ Core 2 expects you to move confidently across Windows, macOS, Linux, security controls, troubleshooting flows, and support procedures, but those domains are easy to study in fragments instead of as one coherent help desk skill set.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever turns the official CompTIA A+ Core 2 objectives into focused 15-minute study sessions so you can build durable understanding across the 220-1202 syllabus without drifting off-spec.

categories.name: Nursing Licensure

exams.name: National Council Licensure Examination for Practical Nurses (NCLEX-PN)

exams.companion_solution: We convert the official test plan into a complete, structured curriculum with concise notes designed for long-term retention and exam readiness.

exams.name: NCLEX-RN

exams.hero_subheadline: Exam-aligned nursing study paths built from the official NCSBN test plan and designed for long-term retention.
exams.companion_problem: Most prep material is fragmented, too broad, or disconnected from the exact NCLEX-RN blueprint.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever maps the official test plan into structured 15-minute topics and retention-first notes so you learn exactly what the exam expects.
